title: Hongtao Cai, Ph.D.
description: Dr. Hongtao Cai joined DKU as Vice Chancellor for Government Affairs in June 2023. text:
Hongtao Cai, Ph.D.
Dr. Hongtao Cai joined DKU as Vice Chancellor for Government Affairs in June 2023. Before coming to DKU, he was a professor and doctoral advisor of Space Physics at Wuhan University, where he also served as Academic Dean (since 2015), Chair of the Industry-University-Research Committee (since 2019) of Electronic Information School and Vice Director of Meridian Project Phase II (since 2018). He has extensive experience with high-tech industrialization and higher education administration.
He received his Bachelor’s degree in Material Physics in 1998 and his Ph.D. in Space Physics in 2003 from Wuhan University. He was a visiting scholar in the Space Science Department at Rutherford Appleton Laboratory, the UK, in 2007.
His research interests mainly focus on space exploring techniques and modeling, magnetosphere-ionosphere-thermosphere coupling, radiowave propagation and how it can be applied in engineering. He has led or participated in more than 30 national-level projects, including those of the NSFC Innovation Group and key R&D plans of MST. His research findings have been applied in various fields. His articles were published in academic journals, including the Journal of Geophysical Research and IEEE AWPL. He is also a council member of the Chinese Society of Space Research, a member of the Sun-Terrestrial Physics Committee and a member of the Space Technology and Operation Committee.
